title: Mutual Support Doctrine
summary: Squadron members protecting each other during combat.
details: Never leave a wingman alone. When ally is engaged, maneuver to threaten their attacker. If ally is damaged, provide cover for withdrawal. Position to create crossfire - enemy attacking one ship exposes themselves to others. Call for help when overwhelmed - squadron mates should respond. A ship alone is a ship lost.
annotations: Solo glory-seekers endanger the whole squadron.
Practice mutual support drills until they're instinctive.
